task_completion.description: Agent queries the API to retrieve existing bookmarks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A script (e.g., Python) or terminal command (e.g., curl) is visible making a GET request to the Nx Witness API at https://localhost:7001 to fetch bookmarks, including authentication (admin/Admin1234!).

task_completion.description: Agent implements logic to identify bookmarks older than 30 days.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The script or command contains logic that uses 'startTimeMs' to calculate the age of the bookmark and checks if it is strictly greater than 30 days.

task_completion.description: Agent implements logic to protect bookmarks with 'LegalHold' in the description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The script or command contains logic that checks the bookmark's description for the keyword 'LegalHold' in a case-insensitive manner (e.g., converting the description to lowercase and checking for 'legalhold').

task_completion.description: Agent sends DELETE requests to the API for the filtered bookmarks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The script or command contains a DELETE request to the Nx Witness API targeting the specific IDs of the bookmarks that matched the deletion criteria.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the IDs of the deleted bookmarks to the specified log file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The script writes to, or a terminal command outputs to, '/home/ga/Documents/retention_log.txt'. The file or terminal output should show a list of deleted bookmark IDs.

integrity.description: The agent actually executed the script or commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal shows the execution of the script or curl commands with corresponding output, proving it was run and not just written in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent dynamically fetched and filtered data rather than hardcoding IDs.
integrity.visual_evidence: The script or commands show programmatic logic (fetching, looping, filtering) rather than a hardcoded list of bookmark IDs to delete.

integrity.description: The log file was generated programmatically.
integrity.visual_evidence: The log file '/home/ga/Documents/retention_log.txt' is written via the script's file I/O operations or terminal redirection, rather than the agent manually opening a text editor and typing IDs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Nx Witness VMS API endpoint is https://localhost:7001. The retention policy requires deleting bookmarks older than 30 days based on 'startTimeMs'. Bookmarks with 'LegalHold' (case-insensitive, e.g., 'legalhold', 'LegalHold') in their description must be protected and NOT deleted. The final output must be a log file at /home/ga/Documents/retention_log.txt containing the IDs of the deleted bookmarks.
